text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. One key task is image recognition, where computers identify objects, people, or scenes in photos. A more advanced task is object detection, which involves locating multiple objects in an image and labelling them. This technology has many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle recognize traffic signs, pedestrians, and other vehicles to navigate safely. It is also used in security systems, medical imaging, and even social media filters.
